title: Fresh optimization
description: This is a basic integration package that integrates common Minecraft mods. The purpose is to allow players to install new Minecraft without having to download mods.
body:
**As of August 28, 2025, Fresh integration has been renamed Fresh optimization.**
# ❓What is Fresh-optimization?
This is a basic integration package that integrates the common mod of Minecraft. (Fresh integration, alias new base integration, both Chinese names can be used for retrieval) The goal is to let players install new Minecraft without the hassle of downloading MODs, Fresh integration integrates most common MODs, resource packs and shaders.Players can add more mod rich games on top of Fresh optimization.
# 🌟Why Choose Fresh optimization
FRO has the same or better performance than FO's incredible optimization, and FRO also includes many practical mod, such as xaero family bucket, MaLiLiB family bucket, gamma tool, etc., all of which make it easier for players to play Minecraft, and also help players play the new version without repeatedly downloading the required auxiliary modules.

FRO has excellent performance optimization, including complete auxiliary module premise, still can maintain frame rate stability, module stability. Each version of the integration package has been tested over 20 times to ensure that the integration package does not interrupt the player's play due to stability. The following are in-game screenshots (Figure 1 is Fresh optimization, Figure 2 is FO)
![In-game screenshots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa466940e3beccc43049637c380ee90596326d47_0.webp)
![In-game screenshots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/048067078363a5ca5c8509004dd47a1cb4c5678d.png)
# ⚠️version doubts
Fresh integration doesn't use forge module loader in later versions (i.e. 1.20 +), forge later versions suck, but use neoforge, so forge loader version doesn't appear in 1.20 +.

When a new version number exists for a consolidation package, the unreleased Minecraft version will use the new consolidation package version number for the first version number when it is released.

FRO1.0 version found a major vulnerability, when the corresponding version 1.1.0 release, will close the 1.0 download channel (except github, github will retain all versions)
# 📢Important Notes
The mod list shown in MC Chinese encyclopedia is a basic mod list. Different versions of the game contain other different mods, but the basic mod will not be deleted unless the version is wrong. The overall mod(excluding dependency library mod) number will not exceed 70, please refer to the mod in the specific game.
# 🤝About copyright
All copyrights and licenses for Mods in this Integration Package are the property of their respective authors. The MIT license for this project applies only to scripts, profiles, or other original content written by FRI editors. Acknowledgements: Thank you to all the Mods authors and those who have helped.

Copyright Supplement:

All rights to the Shadow Complementary contained in this package belong to the developer EminGT, and any problems that may arise from using this Shadow in FRO are the responsibility of the FRO maintainer.

All rights reserved for Photon Shaders included in this package belong to sixthsurge.

Rethinking Voxels included in this package is owned by gri573, and any problems that may arise from using this shadow in FRO are the responsibility of FRO maintainer.

This package contains Super Duper Vanilla All rights reserved by developer 

The Client Sort module included in this package is owned by Client Sort developer TerminalMC.

The resource package Even Better Enchants contained in this package is the property of mythitus, the developer.
# 💗Questions and Answers
1. Q: How do I use the integration package?
  A: You can import this package directly from the launcher, and you need to make sure that the connection with modrinth is smooth.

2. Q: I want to give feedback/comment, where can I submit it?
  A: You can go to github lssues for feedback. If you can visit discord, you can also give feedback there。

3. Q: FRO update unstable, is to abandon pit?
  A: The author is trying to stabilize the weekly update, please forgive me.
